scripts.check:pdf: npm run pdf && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const file='cv_pedro_monteagudo.pdf';if(!fs.existsSync(file)){console.error('Missing '+file);process.exit(1)};const size=fs.statSync(file).size;if(size===0){console.error(file+' is empty');process.exit(1)};console.log('OK '+file+' ('+size+' bytes)')"
